enunciado:
Given two strings 
first
 and 
second
, consider occurrences in some text of the form 
"first second third"
, where 
second
 comes immediately after 
first
, and 
third
 comes immediately after 
second
.


Return 
an array of all the words
 
third
 
for each occurrence of
 
"first second third"
.


 


Example 1:


Input:
 text = "alice is a good girl she is a good student", first = "a", second = "good"

Output:
 ["girl","student"]

Example 2:


Input:
 text = "we will we will rock you", first = "we", second = "will"

Output:
 ["we","rock"]



 


Constraints:




1 <= text.length <= 1000


text
 consists of lowercase English letters and spaces.


All the words in 
text
 are separated by 
a single space
.


1 <= first.length, second.length <= 10


first
 and 
second
 consist of lowercase English letters.


text
 will not have any leading or trailing spaces.
